raw_consumer_statement: I am disputing two charges on my American Express account for {$4000.00} ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) and {$3900.00} ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ), paid to " XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX' ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX ). The hospital 's billing department told me that full payment would resolve and close out the account. Relying on this, I paid in full. Weeks later, they issued additional bills, violating the agreement and engaging in deceptive billing practices.I filed a dispute with American Express under Regulation Z ( Truth in Lending Act ) and am requesting a full chargeback. I believe this is a case of medical billing fraud and a violation of federal consumer protections.I am requesting the CFPBs assistance in resolving this dispute and holding both the hospital and credit issuer accountable.
